description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a covered entryway with a dark overhang, flanked by manicured shrubs and blossoming trees, and a white picket fence enclosing a small garden. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by a green hedge, with poolside lounge chairs and additional open lawn space. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color palette, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on straight lines and open spaces. The property is landscaped with a mix of grass, trees, and hedges, creating a private and inviting urban residence.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a covered entryway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaped gardens and a white picket fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a dark overhang, white picket fence, and blossoming trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lawn, trees, and the pool area at the rear, with minimal windows on this facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, poolside lounge chairs, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lawn, hedges, and a secondary entrance or window, with trees and garden visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a dark overhang, steps, and flanked by blossoming trees and a white picket fence
